themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "The blessing extends beyond personal to communal: 'The LORD shall bless thee out of Zion: and...". Cross references echo "Blessing".

1: Blessed is everyone who fears the Lord
4: for so shall a man Who fears the Lord be blessed

themes.label: Peace/Rest

Commentary leans on "The psalm concludes with multi-generational blessing: 'Yea, thou shalt see thy children's chi...". Cross references echo "Peace".

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Domestic blessing is described: 'Thy wife shall be as a fruitful vine by the sides of thine h...". Word-study detail reinforces "לְשֻׁלְחָנֶֽךָ׃: thy table - a table (as spread out); by implication, a meal".
